entries.notes: 1x1 Linear same as tape_train_demo; write disk artifact with save_linear_artifact. Parameter names match rustral_nn::Linear NamedParameters (lin.weight, lin.bias).
entries.local_artifact_workflow: cargo run -p rustral-runtime --features training --example save_linear_artifact -- tiny_linear.safetensors

entries.notes: rustral_onnx_export::export_linear_f32 emits a single Linear (MatMul+Add) for opset 17. See docs/export-onnx-torchscript.md.

rustral-hf::download_state_dict loads model.safetensors into flat f32 vectors. BERT Module mapping from HF tensor names to Rustral NamedParameters is not automated here; use strict load_model only after keys align.
